title: Remember a Name
summary: Use a memory box to remember a name.
mission_prompt: Put a name in a memory box, then make Python say it.
learning_goals: Use a variable as a memory box.
Print what the memory box holds.
hints: A memory box has a name on the left side.
print(name) says what is inside the name box.
adult_guidance: Use the phrase memory box before introducing the word variable.
